name: vibespec
description: Turn a product idea or planning document into a validated SOT JSON and a self-contained HTML viewer for PRD, Feature Spec, IA, and User Flow.

interface.shortDescription: Turn product ideas into a validated SOT and viewer.
interface.longDescription: VibeSpec turns an idea or planning document into one validated source of truth with PRD, feature specifications, information architecture, and user flows, plus a self-contained editable HTML viewer.
defaultPrompt: Turn my product idea into a validated VibeSpec SOT and HTML viewer.
Create a PRD, feature spec, IA, and user flow from this document.
Review this VibeSpec SOT and fix its validation or coverage issues.
